entity_results.verification_reason: Extracted data has high confidence for some fields (e.g., revenue, customer base, dividend) where values exactly match the source. However, several extracted values are truncated, incomplete, or incorrectly attributed: '运营收入/总收益' includes unrelated profit text; 'EBITDA' only shows partial growth statement; '净利润' captures a header instead of the profit value; '客户数/用户数' is from a different filing; '5G用户数' misses the full penetration figure; '资本开支' is garbled; '券商观点' and '市场反应' are not present in the source at all.
